findings.location: s1 / 多重度 section (階層構造データ形式)
findings.description: The rule that a field with no `[]` annotation is treated as `[1]` (exactly 1 occurrence) is not present in the knowledge file. This is an important default behavior constraint for JSON/XML format implementations.
findings.source_evidence: また、"[]"が付与されていない項目に関しては、"[1]"を指定されたものと見なして出現回数は１回に限定される。

findings.description: Several directive names that appear as primary keys in the directive tables are missing from hints: `negative-zone-sign-nibble`, `negative-pack-sign-nibble`, `ignore-blank-lines`, `max-record-length`, `title-record-type-name`.
findings.source_evidence: Source tables list these directives in the first column: negative-zone-sign-nibble, negative-pack-sign-nibble (固定長table), ignore-blank-lines, max-record-length, title-record-type-name (可変長table).
